notes: Dual-threaded (2 UltraSPARC III cores), on-chip memory controller (16 GB DRAM), 8 MB L2 cache per core; 90nm TI fab; unveiled 2003-10-13 at Microprocessor Forum
'Jalapeno' low-end SPARC; the 2006 chip-multithreading reference point for 15x throughput claim
Continues in Power Systems (POWER10 as of 2021)
Reynolds cited Xeon as taking a toll on all large-server competitors
Kastner named Solaris as Sun's real strength
Chip-multithreading multi-core approach culminating in Niagara/UltraSPARC T1 (2005)
